name: Club 313 Golf
address: 313 N Dorset Ave, Ventnor City, NJ 08406
about: Club 313 Indoor Golf is an indoor golf simulator venue located in Ventnor City, NJ. It offers a country club atmosphere with two state-of-the-art 15-foot TruGolf simulators, a putting green, and amenities like private member lockers and multiple flat-screen TVs. The venue provides detailed golf swing data analysis and access to over 100 virtual golf courses, including Pebble Beach. For non-members, the facility operates on a pay-per-hour basis with weekday and weekend rates, while members enjoy unlimited play, 24/7 access, and preferred tee times.
why_golfers_like_it: Two TruGolf simulators provide detailed swing data analysis
Access to over 100 virtual courses including Pebble Beach
Country club atmosphere with amenities like a putting green and private lockers

food_and_drink.notes: Food available next door at Capri Pizza

simulator_hardware.notes: State-of-the-art simulators with swing data tracking

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, players should bring their own golf clubs to use with the simulators.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue operates on a BYOB (Bring Your Own Beverage) policy, and food is available next door at Capri Pizza.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time to play 18 holes may vary depending on the number of players and course selection, but typical simulator sessions are based on hourly rates.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is kid-friendly and welcomes families, though parental supervision is recommended for younger players.
